title: The Day I Got a Team
subtitle: Most tools wait for instructions. MiniClaw doesn't.
author: Amelia

panels.caption: Before MiniClaw, I held everything in my head. Nothing was where I could find it.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Geometric, architectural backgrounds. Wide panel. A lone figure — strong jaw, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt, electric teal graphic eyes — stands in a stark white geometric space. Floating around him: dozens of small text fragments, half-written task labels, loose threads. They orbit loosely, some drifting away. The figure holds a hand up as if trying to catch something. Clean precise lines, flat sky-blue and warm sand palette, white space, bright accent red on the drifting fragments. No speech bubbles. Minimal, architectural. The mood: productive but barely contained.

panels.caption: Then he opened the board. A ticket appeared. Someone picked it up.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Close-up panel. A single kanban card — clean rectangular form, bold title, crisp geometric border — floats in bright white space. Below the card, a hand reaches up to take it. The hand belongs to someone just out of frame. The card casts a clean geometric shadow on a flat surface. Sky-blue accent on the card border. Warm sand on the card face. The moment is still, precise, inevitable. Clean lines. No chaos. This is clarity.

panels.caption: Adaora researches. Emi builds. Layla designs. They don't wait for me to ask.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Mid-shot panel. Three distinct figure silhouettes — rendered in clean geometric line-art against a light architectural background — each seated at a separate minimal terminal, each working. The terminals are arranged like workstations in an open-plan studio. Above each figure, a small floating card with their role: RESEARCHER, DEVELOPER, DESIGNER in clean sans-serif type. Sky-blue, sand, and accent gold on the cards. White background with architectural grid lines suggesting depth. The figures are focused, independent, parallel. This is a team. Ligne claire flat color.

panels.caption: The board isn't a record. It's action.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Architectural wide panel. A clean isometric diagram — kanban columns rendered in flat geometric shapes, three columns labeled with clean type: RESEARCH, PLANNING, BUILDING. Between columns: small arrows. Ticket cards move left to right in a clean systematic flow. One column has a golden gate symbol — the human approval checkpoint. The overall composition is like a technical blueprint or architectural cross-section. Sky-blue columns, warm sand cards, accent gold on the gate. Geometric, precise, beautiful. Moebius technical illustration energy.

panels.caption: I released the plan. It lived on.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Mid-shot portrait panel. The character — strong jaw, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt, clean graphic electric teal eyes — sits with hands open, relaxed. Behind him through a wide geometric window: the MiniClaw board is visible, cards moving, agents working. He is not watching it anxiously. He is present, at ease. His expression: settled. The composition has the calm spaciousness of ligne claire — lots of clean white, architectural framing, sky-blue and warm sand. Light from the window falls cleanly on his face. No drama. Just clarity.

panels.caption: The Kanban board that not can but does. That's MiniClaw. That's what changed.
panels.prompt: Ligne claire comic art, precise clean ink lines, flat unshaded color fields, Moebius / Hergé style. Final wide panel. Low angle shot looking up. The MiniClaw kanban board fills the upper half — a clean architectural grid of active tickets, cards mid-motion, agents indicated by small distinct geometric icons in each lane. The character stands in the foreground, small relative to the board, looking up at it. His teal eyes catch the light from the board. The board is active. The board is alive. Sky-blue, warm sand, clean white, gold accent borders on active cards. The composition: one human, one system, working. Clean. Inevitable. Ligne claire masterwork.

captions_es: Antes de MiniClaw, lo guardaba todo en la cabeza. Nada estaba donde pudiera encontrarlo.
Entonces abrió el tablero. Un ticket apareció. Alguien lo cogió.
Adaora investiga. Emi construye. Layla diseña. No esperan a que se lo pida.
El tablero no es un registro. Es acción.
El tablero Kanban que no solo puede, sino que hace. Eso es MiniClaw. Eso es lo que cambió.
